html:
Financial Edge is a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Edge Integrated Media Enterprise Limited, incorporated to carry out specialize corporate services in the media industry and other related areas in the economy.

In our quest to provide the best delivery of information on local and global financial Markets, Financial Edge pulled together seasoned professionals with credible background.

[td_block_text_with_title custom_title=”Contact Details”]Address: 4/6, Mobolaji Bank Anthony Street, Beside Lion Building Police Station Off Broad Street, Lagos Island Lagos. Nigeria.

Phone: 08058554915, 08028894929

Email: financialedgenews@gmail.com[/td_block_text_with_title][td_block_text_with_title custom_title=”Our vision”]
“To be a reference point in finance & economic sector reporting in Africa”[/td_block_text_with_title][td_block_text_with_title custom_title=”Mission”]
“To bridge the wide gap created in the finance & economic reporting, by presenting timely analyses and objective news commentary to the public”[/td_block_text_with_title]
